title: argemone corymbosa
intro: Argemone corymbosa, also known as Mexican prickly poppy or prickly poppy, is a plant species native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Argemone corymbosa is often prepared as a decoction or tincture for medicinal use, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
